title: AI Blood Cell Detection
blurb: Custom YOLO11m pipeline for automated blood-smear diagnostics with parasitemia reporting.
overview: An end-to-end diagnostic assistant that detects RBCs, WBCs, platelets and malaria parasites from blood-smear images, then generates structured parasitemia reports for clinicians.
features: Custom-trained YOLO11m on curated blood-smear dataset
Flask web interface with per-case history
SQLite-backed case storage and audit trail
architecture: PyTorch training pipeline with augmentation stack
YOLO11m inference service exposed via Flask
SQLite persistence for cases, results and reports

title: PPE Detection System
blurb: Real-time safety compliance platform with multi-object tracking and violation analytics.
overview: A production-grade PPE compliance system that streams from multiple cameras, tracks workers across frames and logs violations to a live dashboard.
features: ByteTrack multi-object tracking with ReID association
architecture: YOLO26 detector optimized for edge inference
ByteTrack + ReID for stable identity across frames
Flask + WebSocket dashboard for live analytics
SQLite event store for violations and audits

title: AI Retail Analytics
blurb: Multi-camera retail intelligence with cross-camera ReID and live behavioral analytics.
overview: Modular retail analytics stack that unifies detections across cameras, tracking journeys, dwell time, demographics and zone conversion in a live dashboard.
features: Cross-camera person ReID with OSNet embeddings
Polygon zone analytics, dwell time and heatmaps
Journey paths and conversion funnels per zone
architecture: OSNet ReID gallery for cross-camera identity
Docker Compose deployment for edge / on-prem
